## HITL Patterns

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<ComparisonTable title="HITL Pattern Comparison" columns={['Pattern','Best For','Automation Level','User Experience']} rows={[
  ['Approval Gate','All actions reviewed','Low (0%)','Safe but slow'],
  ['Confidence Routing','Mixed complexity workloads','Medium (60-80%)','Fast for routine, careful for complex'],
  ['Exception Handling','Mostly routine with rare edge cases','High (90%+)','Smooth, rare interruptions'],
  ['Active Learning','Improving AI over time','Increasing','Gets better with use'],
]}/>
